// A/C SAIL / 75,000 MT (+)10% (-)5% OO. COKING COAL IN BULK EX: AUSTRALIA TO ECI //
DATE 10TH DEC 2025
REF :IBC/PB/001
HAVE FOLL TO FIX:
ACCT SAIL
CARGO AND QUANTITY:
75,000 MT (+)10% (-)5% OO. COKING COAL IN BULK
LAYDAYS
: 10-19 JAN 2026
LOADPORT:
1/2 SB 1 SP ABBOT POINT COAL TERMINAL / HAY POINT COAL TERMINAL /DALRYMPLE BAY COAL TERMINAL, AUSTRALIA
LOADRATE:
40,000 MT/ 45000 MT AT CHOPTION PWWD SHINC
DISCHARGEPORT:
1/ 2 SB / SA EACH 1/ 2 SP OUT OF VIZAG / GANGAVARAM / PARADIP / DHAMRA
/GOPALPUR / SANDHEADS OR SAGAR – HALDIA SYAMA PRASAD MOOKERJEE (SMP) / HALDIA SMP. SAGAR – HALDIA / HALDIA, IF USED, WILL ALWAYS BE AS 2ND DISCHARGE PORT.
DISCHARGE RATE:
VIZAG: 20,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU
PARADIP: 10,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU
GANGAVARAM (GPL): 40,000 MT SHINC
DHAMRA: 35000 MT SHINC
GOPALPUR:15000 MT SHINC
SANDHEADS/SAGAR : 10000 MT SHINC
HALDIA: 12,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU
(NOTE: UU/SHINC PROVISION TO BE APPLICABLE AFTER COMMENCEMENT OF LAYTIME).
DEMURRAGE/DESPATCH:
THE CEILING DEMURRAGE RATE FOR THIS ENQUIRY SHALL BE USD 17500 PER DAY / HD. HOWEVER, BIDDERS CAN QUOTE BELOW THE CEILING RATE.
FREIGHT:
THE FREIGHT RATE TO BE QUOTED BASIS ONE LOAD PORT (HPCT/DBCT)/ONE DISCHARGE PORT (VIZAG PORT) I.E. (1/1) BASIS
DISCHARGE RATE OF 20000 METRIC TONS.
REPLY BY 1200 HOURS IST THURDAY I.E 11TH DECEMBER 2025
+ + + +
